fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether this customized calendar entry was set up for your company, a customer, vendor, location, shipping agent, or a service.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source identity of the business partner the customized calendar is set up for.

fields.name: Additional Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the shipping agent service if the Source Type field contains Shipping Agent.

fields.name: Base Calendar Code
fields.tooltip: There are a number of tables and fields that are not currently documented. There is no specific Help for these tables and fields.

fields.name: Source Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source name associated with this entry.

fields.name: Customized Changes Exist
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this entry has used the base calendar to create a customized calendar.
